name: Custom Vanguard
text: [AUTO](VC): When placed, draw a card. [ACT](VC): COST [Counter Blast (1)], and this unit gets Power +5000 until end of turn.
notes: Replace this row with your own card.

name: Custom Trigger
text: [AUTO]: When this unit is revealed for a trigger check, choose one of your units, and it gets Power +10000 until end of turn.
notes: Image file is optional while drafting.
